searchDocs.title: Duration​
searchDocs.content: </> State.Duration: number The total duration of the State. A value of 0 is used for a State that will never be exited.

searchDocs.title: Elapsed​
searchDocs.content: </> State.Elapsed: number The amount of time the State has been ticked for.

searchDocs.title: Name​
searchDocs.content: </> State.Name: string The name of the State object.

searchDocs.title: Priority​
searchDocs.content: </> State.Priority: number The priority of the State. Describes the point in the queue at which the State object will be placed. Clamped (1-99)

searchDocs.title: new​
searchDocs.content: </> State.new(Props: table?Optionaltableofpropertiestooverrideoraddproperties.) → () Creates a new State instance

searchDocs.title: OnEnter​
searchDocs.content: </> State:OnEnter() → () Called by the StateMachine when entering a state.

searchDocs.title: OnExit​
searchDocs.content: </> State:OnExit() → () Called by the StateMachine when exiting a state.

searchDocs.title: Update​
searchDocs.content: </> State:Update(dt: number) → () Called each frame by the StateMachine.

searchDocs.title: _Queue​
searchDocs.content: This item is read only and cannot be modified. Read Only </> StateMachine._Queue: table The StateMachine queue. Used to iterate States.

searchDocs.title: CurrentState​
searchDocs.content: </> StateMachine.CurrentState: State The State object which is being actively ticked.

searchDocs.title: LastState​
searchDocs.content: </> StateMachine.LastState: State The last State object the StateMachine was ticking.

searchDocs.title: new​
searchDocs.content: </> StateMachine.new(StartIn: StateThedefaultStateobject;usedasafallbackandonstartup.) → () Creates a new StateMachine instance.

searchDocs.title: Transition​
searchDocs.content: </> StateMachine:Transition(Target: StateThestateobjecttoaddtothequeue.) → () Adds a state to the StateMachine queue. Passes the StateMachine object to the target State.

searchDocs.title: Clear​
searchDocs.content: </> StateMachine:Clear() → () Clear the StateMachine's queue. Used when a player needs to be forced idle.

searchDocs.title: Update​
searchDocs.content: </> StateMachine:Update(dt: numberDeltaTimereturnedbyRunService.Heartbeat) → () Ticks the StateMachine. Moves through states in the queue.
